criteria.name: Programming language proficiency
criteria.description: Evidence of building software with at least one programming language.
evidence_required: Project or coursework using a programming language
positive_signals: Language is tied to implementation work

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Data structures and algorithms
criteria.description: Evidence of core computer science foundations relevant to intern roles.
evidence_required: Coursework, practice, or project using algorithms
positive_signals: Shows understanding through coursework or implementation

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Software project evidence
criteria.description: Evidence of designing, implementing, and explaining a software project.
positive_signals: Describes what was built and how

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Version control and Git
criteria.description: Evidence of using Git or collaborative version control workflows.
positive_signals: Mentions commits, branches, review, or repository

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Testing and debugging
criteria.description: Evidence of validating code behavior or diagnosing issues.
positive_signals: Describes testing method or bug fixed

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance

criteria.name: API, backend, or frontend development evidence
criteria.description: Evidence of building user-facing, backend, API, or full-stack components.
positive_signals: Feature scope and technology choice are clear

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: System design awareness for intern level
criteria.description: Evidence of basic awareness of data flow, interfaces, storage, or tradeoffs.
evidence_required: Architecture, data flow, or design tradeoff note

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Collaboration and code readability
criteria.description: Evidence of readable code, documentation, teamwork, or review habits.
evidence_required: Team project, documentation, or review evidence
negative_signals: Vague team claim without role clarity

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
source.notes: Manually curated from common public role expectations.

criteria.name: Measurable engineering impact, ATS readability, and truthfulness
criteria.description: Uses measurable impact only when user-provided and keeps technical claims evidence-backed.
negative_signals: Invented metrics or unsupported ownership claims

source.title: Generic public role-fit guidance
